body.title: [sprint] Move global_kb loader + seed under the installer device
body.description:
**Problem:** global_kb is global instance-init (clones/pulls a KB repo, creates the global_kb.patterns Postgres table, upserts patterns/*.jsonl seed). Today the loader is unseen_university/global_kb.py and the seed is the global_kb/ dir at repo root — both ownerless and root-cluttering. Per D-installer-absorbs-init, global init belongs to the installer device.
**Proposed shape:** Move the loader unseen_university/global_kb.py -> unseen_university/devices/installer/global_kb.py (or installer/init/global_kb.py — decide at sprint per installer's internal layout), and the seed dir global_kb/ -> alongside it under the installer device (so the loader reads its seed via a path relative to its new home / importlib.resources, not the repo root). Update the single consumer unseen_university/devices/archivist/contrib.py (import path) + any test imports. Add the seed (patterns/*.jsonl) to package-data so it ships. Verify the bootstrap path still resolves the seed from the new location.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/global_kb.py -> unseen_university/devices/installer/...; global_kb/ seed dir -> under installer; unseen_university/devices/archivist/contrib.py (import update); tests referencing global_kb; pyproject package-data (already globs *.jsonl? verify).
**Design rules:** one home (global init under installer); migrate->VERIFY->delete (confirm import + seed-read resolve before removing old paths); shipped read-only asset (seed) is package-data read via importlib.resources, NOT repo-root-relative open; check with Akien before any new ~/.unseen_university path (none expected — seed is in-package, runtime KB clone stays in uu_home as today).
**Scope boundary:** IN — relocate the global_kb loader + seed under the installer device + fix the archivist import + seed-read path. OUT — the architecture intention-point (separate ticket); classifying/moving OTHER scattered bootstraps (T-inventory); changing the KB schema or bootstrap logic.
**Test plan:** (1) `ls unseen_university/global_kb.py 2>/dev/null` -> absent; the loader present under devices/installer/. (2) `python3 -c 'import unseen_university.devices.installer... ; <loader importable>'` resolves. (3) archivist contrib import resolves (`python3 -c 'import unseen_university.devices.archivist.contrib'`). (4) The bootstrap reads its seed from the new in-package location (dry-run/unit: enumerate_records finds baseline.jsonl) with no repo-root-relative path. (5) pytest --collect-only clean.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
